mapper.select: SELECT * FROM announcement ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM announcement ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM announcement WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, status, sort_order, publish_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE announcement SET status = #{status}, publish_time = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'PUBLISHED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE publish_time END, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
